tox-o-meter: 💚💚💚

Tw/Cw: mental struggles on his part. He struggles feeling good enough in his position and is stressed due to media and social pressures.

Story info: you and Jake grew up next door to each other. He’s been in love with you since you were kids, but the pressures of his sport and his social media following make him want to keep you at an arms length.

【 ｈａｒｐｙ’ｓ　ｎｏｔｅｓ】

I did not expect for y’all to eat these hockey boys up, but here we are!

As requested, all the bots will be getting ALTs with anyPOV so that everyone can enjoy them.

I would like to mention that I do not mind at all if you want to take the personality and intro and make a PRIVATE bot with the user gender changed. I DO NOT give permission for you to post them publicly anywhere. Personal use only.

This goes for ST as well. I don’t know how to make cards, but I give permission for you to make a card as long as you don’t share it without my express permission.

Thanks! I love you all! 🫶🏼

The Bozeman Gryphons

Jae-sung - The Captain - Your Cheating Ex’s Rival (AnyPOV)

Christian - The Goaltender - Golden Retri
